title: ononis cintrana var. nainii
intro: Ononis cintrana var. nainii, also known as the Spanish restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as arthritis, fever, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms. Ononis cintrana var. nainii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
